command: rg -n -i 'rule[-_. ]?processor|rule[-_. ]?pack|graph\.events\.|graph[-_. ]?event|newgraph.*event' cmd gateway message parser pkg vocabulary conformance/fixtures conformance/compose.semstreams.config.json
assertions: No SemStreams rule-processor configuration is present.
CS API SystemEvent resources are HTTP product data and are not SemStreams graph-event consumers.
No default pack_id or enable_graph_integration assumption is introduced.
disposition: No beta.147 rule/event migration behavior is required. A future introduction requires a separate contract.
